MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: The Penn Computerized Neurobehavioral Battery (CNB) is an online cognitive assessment consisting of a series of tasks that measure accuracy and speed of performance in major cognitive domains.

session_id.Description: BIDS session label assigned chronologically via Flywheel created timestamp

cnb_cpw_rtcr.LongName: CPW Median Response Time for Correct Responses

cnb_cpw_w_rtcr.LongName: CPW Weighted Median Response Time for Correct Responses

cnb_cpw_rter.LongName: CPW Median Response Time for Incorrect Responses

cnb_cpw_w_rter.LongName: CPW Weighted Median Response Time for Incorrect Responses

cnb_cpw_rt.LongName: CPW Median Response Time for All Responses

cnb_cpw_tprt.LongName: CPW Median Response Time for True Positive Responses

cnb_cpw_tnrt.LongName: CPW Median Response Time for True Negative Responses

cnb_cpw_fprt.LongName: CPW Median Response Time for False Positive Responses

cnb_cpw_fnrt.LongName: CPW Median Response Time for False Negative Responses

cnb_cpw_cnt_200.LongName: CPW Total Count of Responses Under 200 milliseconds

cnb_cpw_lrsr.LongName: CPW Longest Run of Same Responses

cnb_cpw_valid_code.LongName: Validation Code for entire Children's Penn Word Memory Test

Levels.F: Likely valid, problem occurred which affected performance for a limited number of responses/mild to moderate effect
